label: Loft 放样
description: 将多个 profile 截面放样为实体。V1 要求所有 profile 点数一致。何时用：截面沿高度渐变的形体（漏斗/喇叭口/过渡接头/机翼），primitive 无法表达这种渐变。
description-en: Loft multiple profile sections into a solid. V1 requires matching point counts. Use when: a body whose cross-section changes along its length (funnel/horn/transition duct/wing) — primitives cannot express this taper.

inputs.name: geometry
inputs.label: 几何
inputs.description: 上游 Geometry（必须含 profile_ids 列出的全部 profile）
inputs.description-en: Upstream Geometry; must contain every profile listed in profile_ids.

inputs.name: profile_ids
inputs.label: Profile id 列表
inputs.description: 用逗号/空格/分号分隔多个 profile id（按放样顺序）；每个来自一个上游 Profile 节点的 id 输出
inputs.description-en: Delimited list (comma/space/semicolon) of profile ids in loft order; each from an upstream Profile node's `id` output.

inputs.name: height
inputs.label: 总高度
inputs.description: z_values 为空时按此总高度均匀分布各截面
inputs.description-en: When z_values is empty, sections are spaced evenly over this total height.

inputs.name: z_values
inputs.label: Z 值列表
inputs.description: 可选；各截面的 Z 高度列表，为空时按 height 均匀分布
inputs.description-en: Optional per-section Z heights; empty = evenly distributed over height.

inputs.name: ruled
inputs.label: 直纹
inputs.description: true = 截面间直纹（不光滑过渡）

inputs.name: id
inputs.label: id
inputs.description: 本结果的自定义 id；空 = 自动 loft{n}

outputs.name: geometry
outputs.label: 几何
outputs.description: 追加放样实体后的 Geometry
outputs.description-en: Geometry after appending the lofted solid.

outputs.name: id
outputs.label: id
outputs.description: 本行 shape 的 id（供下游引用）；引用失败时为空串
outputs.description-en: Id of the new shape (for downstream refs). Empty string when a ref failed.

outputs.name: error
outputs.label: 错误
outputs.description: profile_ids 缺失/找不到/点数不一致时的原因；非空表示未追加任何几何，批次仍可能报 ok，务必读取
outputs.description-en: Reason when profile_ids are missing, not found, or have mismatched point counts. Non-empty means nothing was appended even though the batch may report ok — always read it.
